programs.programName: Georgia State Health Insurance Assistance Program (Georgia SHIP)

verified.notes: Georgia SHIP is a counseling and assistance program, not a benefits program with eligibility criteria. It provides free information and enrollment help to all Medicare beneficiaries and caregivers regardless of age, income, or assets. No age, income, or asset limits apply. Phone number confirmed from official Georgia Department of Human Services source (select option 4).
